faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offer best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: Is it worth to consider PES University - Hanumanth Nagar Campus as a good Institute?
faqs.answer: PES University - Hanumanth Nagar Campus is a well-known institution for M.Pharma, After 1th Diploma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, PES University - Hanumanth Nagar Campus has a rating of 3 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3 on campuslife, 3.5 on placements, 4 on faculty and 2 on Infrastructure.

placements.overview:
PES University - Hanumanth Nagar Campus is a private institute, established in 1972 in Bangalore, Karnataka. PES University - Hanumanth Nagar Campus is approved by PCI and AICTE and offers a total of 5 courses at PG and After 10th levels in 5 specialisations such as Automobile Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and Pharmacognosy. Furthermore, it offer courses such as After 10th Diploma and M.Pharma in Full Time mode. PES University - Hanumanth Nagar Campus has an annual seat intake of 240 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering and Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

PES University - Hanumanth Nagar Campus offers a wide range of programmes at both PG and After 10th levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering and Medicine & Health Sciences. At the PG stage, courses available include M.Pharma. For the After 10th level, there is a wide range of courses like After 10th Diploma.

review_content.Placements: We had no placement for PUC in the Hanumanth Nagar branch, but there was a placement opportunity in the RR Nagar branch, so we had no idea about this as we were not given any information about the placements in this branch of the college. But the course was very effective .
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was really good. It’s not only about the building but also the management. The building was strong and good to go for more than 10 years. reviews_list.review_title: Heavy fees poor people cannot afford in this college for everything we have to pay even in canteen

review_content.Placements: Around 60 students in my class overall students maybe in Lacs Package starting is only from 70000 But amount is very huge for everything they will ask amount it's like heavy budget movie only feels structure iss too high leaving that everything is fine.
review_content.Infrastructure: Teachers are very good and friendly to their students but sometimes even if it is their mistake they will try to hide that and put their mistake on other students. Some teacher are very worthy they are so inspired they will be soo friendly and helpful too.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (May 2025) - Diploma in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It was really such a good campus with good discipline and strict rules.

review_content.Placements: Students who scored more than 60% got a seat. On this campus, companies like Tata, Kalyani Infotech, Infosys, Toyota, etc. hired students for jobs in the last semester. Students who scored more than 75-80% were selected for the companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and libraries were very spacious and well managed by the department. Labs were very clean, and they taught very clearly so that anyone could understand it easily. They even had a canteen, and the taste of the food was very good, with a low price.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (May 2025) - Diploma in Automobile Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It's a good college with some cons.

review_content.Placements: 10 to 12k internships are offered, which is a waste. One cannot blame the institution for it, as it is a Diploma. More than 80 percent of students pass with more than 60 percent. Packages are not good for Diploma students, and the top recruiters are Tata and more than 10 other companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is good infrastructure and labs, but Wi-Fi is not available for students. Hostels are available. The canteen is bad as the prices are good, but the taste is not. Sports practice can be done after college hours, and some competitions are held twice a year. There is no medical facility, and the classes are a bit dusty.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (Sep 2022)- M.Pharm. in Pharmacognosy - Batch of 2022

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students got placement opportunities in our college. The highest salary package offered was 50 LPA and the lowest salary package was 25 LPA. The recruiting companies were Cipla and many more that deal with high-end issues with drugs and medicines. Around 35% of students got internships. The role offered was drug analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were average. There was only a single washroom. Library was good. Wi-Fi was not provided in our college. The food served in the hostel was great. Hostels were well-ventilated and great. They served average food. Our college provided very good facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (May 2025) - Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Teaching is not satisfactory. Students are finding it inconvenient.

review_content.Placements: Not a lot of students take the mechanical course. The strength is getting lower by the year. Companies like Kirloskar recruit students from our campus. Top roles are for the level of operators. Most of them don't get placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a library. Computer labs are available, but most of them don't work. There is a playground, a yoga hall and an auditorium. We have sports carnivals annually. Our college also has a canteen, which is quite expensive. We don't rely on the canteen.

hostel_campus.college_name: MIT Vishwaprayag University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The university offers good infrastructure and decent placements, with scope for self-growth.
reviews.review_text: MIT Vishwaprayag University has good infrastructure. It has campus-wide Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs, and smart classrooms. It supports effective learning. Hostel facilities are decent and comfortable for students. University also gives strong importance to sports, and regularly organizing events. It provides all the required equipment for respective sports, encouraging overall student development.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty members, infrastructure, and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is very good, which means there are large classrooms. Computer labs are available whenever you want to use them. The hostel is not fully developed yet but its infrastructure is also good. Mess and canteen food are also best quality.

reviews.review_heading: Our university is located in Kegav near Solapur. It is the best university in Solapur.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our course include Wi-Fi connection in labs and classrooms. Every student has their own individual PC. Facilities available in the hostel are Wi-Fi and lifts. There are AC and non-AC rooms. The food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, campus life, and average faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good Wi-Fi, excellent labs with updated PCs, clean classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostel rooms are okay. The food in the mess is tasty but a bit costly. All the sports equipment is available, like football, cricket kits, table tennis, badminton, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am thankful and satisfied.
reviews.review_text: In our university, it's 7 7-floor building which includes computer labs, individual computers for every student, electronic lab, physics lab, and huge library for all courses, not only course-related material, but also includes self-growing books, story books, and all. In hostel, there are 2 students in one room, which includes AC and non-AC facilities. Wi-Fi facility and lift are available.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and the best faculty.
reviews.review_text: Labs are the best, but sometimes Wi-Fi issues occur, and a few computers do not work. The library is also full of resources and has many books related to our course. The food quality in the canteen is average, but there is a different menu every day. The playground is not ready yet.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty
reviews.review_text: There are lifts in our college four lifts are there and the classrooms are excellent provided with smart tv and individual computers for everyone and the hostel is getting started by this year and it also includes lift and steps and wifi facility in hostel and university too

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members but not the campus in future.
reviews.review_text: We have computer lab, Wi-Fi, and library with essential books. We also have big classroom and tutorial rooms for students. But not big canteen facility for all students. We have to wait in queue, and also rates are so high for snacks and breakfast but not give that much quantity of food.
